bohemian_rhapsody.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
bohemian_rhapsody.lyrics:
Is this the real life?
Is this just fantasy?
Caught in a landslide
No escape from reality
Open your eyes
Look up to the skies and see

lyrics_map.text: Look up to the skies and see

livin_on_a_prayer.title: Livin' on a Prayer
livin_on_a_prayer.lyrics:
Tommy used to work on the docks
Union's been on strike
He's down on his luck
It's tough, so tough
Gina works the diner all day
Working for her man

lyrics_map.text: Tommy used to work on the docks
Gina works the diner all day

dont_stop_believin.title: Don't Stop Believin'
dont_stop_believin.lyrics:
Just a small town girl
Livin' in a lonely world
She took the midnight train
Goin' anywhere
Just a city boy
Born and raised in South Detroit

lyrics_map.text: Born and raised in South Detroit

dancing_queen.title: Dancing Queen
dancing_queen.lyrics:
You can dance
You can jive
Having the time of your life
Ooh, see that girl
Watch that scene
Digging the dancing queen

lyrics_map.text: Having the time of your life

i_will_survive.title: I Will Survive
i_will_survive.lyrics:
At first I was afraid
I was petrified
Kept thinking I could never live
Without you by my side
But then I spent so many nights
Thinking how you did me wrong

lyrics_map.text: Kept thinking I could never live
But then I spent so many nights
Thinking how you did me wrong

sweet_caroline.title: Sweet Caroline
sweet_caroline.lyrics:
Sweet Caroline
Good times never seemed so good
I've been inclined
To believe they never would
But now I
Look at the night

lyrics_map.text: Good times never seemed so good

imagine.title: Imagine
imagine.lyrics:
Imagine there's no heaven
It's easy if you try
No hell below us
Above us only sky
Imagine all the people
Living for today

hey_jude.title: Hey Jude
hey_jude.lyrics:
Hey Jude, don't make it bad
Take a sad song and make it better
Remember to let her into your heart
Then you can start to make it better

lyrics_map.text: Hey Jude, don't make it bad
Take a sad song and make it better
Remember to let her into your heart
Then you can start to make it better

house_rising_sun.title: House of the Rising Sun
house_rising_sun.lyrics:
There is a house in New Orleans
They call the Rising Sun
And it's been the ruin
Of many a poor boy
And God, I know I'm one

lyrics_map.text: There is a house in New Orleans
And God, I know I'm one

folsom_prison.title: Folsom Prison Blues
folsom_prison.lyrics:
I hear the train a comin'
It's rolling round the bend
And I ain't seen the sunshine
Since I don't know when
I'm stuck in Folsom prison
And time keeps draggin' on

lyrics_map.text: I hear the train a comin'
And I ain't seen the sunshine

ring_of_fire.title: Ring of Fire
ring_of_fire.lyrics:
I fell into a burning ring of fire
I went down, down, down
And the flames went higher
And it burns, burns, burns
The ring of fire

lyrics_map.text: I fell into a burning ring of fire

la_bamba.title: La Bamba
la_bamba.lyrics:
Para bailar la bamba
Para bailar la bamba
Se necesita una poca de gracia
Una poca de gracia pa' mi pa' ti
Y arriba y arriba

lyrics_map.text: Se necesita una poca de gracia
Una poca de gracia pa' mi pa' ti

wonderwall.title: Wonderwall
wonderwall.lyrics:
Today is gonna be the day
That they're gonna throw it back to you
By now you should've somehow
Realized what you gotta do

lyrics_map.text: Today is gonna be the day
That they're gonna throw it back to you

hotel_california.title: Hotel California
hotel_california.lyrics:
On a dark desert highway
Cool wind in my hair
Warm smell of colitas
Rising up through the air

yesterday.title: Yesterday
yesterday.lyrics:
Yesterday
All my troubles seemed so far away
Now it looks as though they're here to stay
Oh, I believe in yesterday

lyrics_map.text: All my troubles seemed so far away
Now it looks as though they're here to stay
